title: argyranthemum frutescens subsp. parviflorum
intro: Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. parviflorum, also known as the daisy or marguerite, is a flowering plant native to the Canary Islands and the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid content. The health benefits of Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. parviflorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
